## Description

Brief description of what this PR does.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Refactoring

## Related Issues

Closes #(issue number)

## Changes Made

- Bullet point 1
- Bullet point 2
- Bullet point 3

## Testing

- [ ] Unit tests added/updated
- [ ] Integration tests added/updated
- [ ] Manual testing completed
- [ ] All tests pass locally

**Test Steps:**
1. Step 1
2. Step 2
3. Expected result

## Screenshots (if applicable)

If this PR includes UI changes, add before/after screenshots.

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows style guidelines
- [ ] Self-review completed
- [ ] Comments added for complex logic
- [ ] Documentation updated
- [ ] No new warnings generated
- [ ] Tests added/updated
- [ ] Commit messages are clear
- [ ] No breaking changes (or clearly documented)
- [ ] Database migrations created (if needed)
- [ ] Environment variables documented (if added)

## Database Migrations

If this PR includes database changes:
- [ ] Migration generated: `npm run db:generate`
- [ ] Migration tested locally
- [ ] Rollback plan documented

## Performance Impact

- [ ] No performance impact
- [ ] Improves performance (describe)
- [ ] Potential performance impact (describe and justify)

## Breaking Changes

If this introduces breaking changes, describe:
- What changed
- Migration path for users
- Deprecation timeline

## Additional Notes

Any additional context or notes for reviewers.

---

Thank you for contributing to VMS! Please ensure all checklist items are complete before requesting review.
